text:
Once there was a forest that had never seen darkness. It dawned every morning like the first light of dawn.

A wolf lived there. His name was Grayson.

A mouse lived there. Her name was Mei.

Every day, Mei would go out in the early morning light.

She'd follow the sun. She'd run through a garden. She'd climb the grassy hill.

She didn't want a world full of shades of gray. She wanted only soft patches of brown and greens.

One morning, as dawn broke, everything just felt right.

She ran down the vine-draped path. A bright yellow butterfly flitted through the flowers. The sun kissed the petals.

She picked berries. She nibbled on a bit of acorn. Her tiny teeth chewed with delight.

A gentle breeze rustled leaves.

Mei dreamed of a forest full of colors she'd never seen. She wished for flowers that sang, flowers that twinkled like stars.

She knew she'd get
